title: MCPvP Golden Heads
description: Adds the Golden Heads from MCPvP
body:
# **GoldenHeads**
- A Minecraft plugin that adds Golden Heads from MCPvP
- You can configure pretty much everything in the plugin to your liking

**When consuming a golden head:**
- Regeneration II (Can be configured)
- Absorption I (Can be configured)
- (You can also put Speed in config.yml)
- Cooldown (Can be configured)

**To get the Golden Head do /givegoldenhead**

NOTE: Golden Heads will still work after you remove the plugin.
